name: libsocket6-perl
title: libsocket6-perl
description:
Perl extensions for IPv6
The Socket6 module supports getaddrinfo() and getnameinfo() to intend
to enable protocol independent programming. If your environment
supports IPv6, IPv6 related defines such as AF_INET6 are included.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsocket6-perl because Perl extensions for IPv6.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsocket6-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsocket6-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsocket6-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
